name: Create Spanish Vocabulary Flashcards
description: Create a 4-page vocabulary flashcard flipchart for a Spanish unit on 'La Casa' (The House) in ActivInspire. Page 1 must include the text 'La Casa' and 'Vocabulario' along with a decorative shape. Page 2 must include the Spanish text 'La cocina', English text 'Kitchen', and a colored rectangle. Page 3 must include the Spanish text 'El dormitorio', English text 'Bedroom', and a colored rectangle. Page 4 must include the Spanish text 'El baño', English text 'Bathroom', and a colored rectangle. Save the completed flipchart to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/la_casa_vocabulario.flipchart.
